query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS shared_accommodations (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  accommodationId int NOT NULL,
  meetupId int NOT NULL,
  sharedByUserId varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  sharedByName varchar(255),
  hotelName varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  hotelAddress text,
  checkInDate varchar(50),
  checkInTime varchar(20),
  checkOutDate varchar(50),
  checkOutTime varchar(20),
  roomType varchar(100),
  phone varchar(100),
  notes text,
  createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(id),
  INDEX idx_meetup (meetupId),
  INDEX idx_shared_by (sharedByUserId)
);
